power.politicalserver.icarus_dive.desc: Take to the skies under Viltrumite flight, then hurl yourself forward like a missile.
power.politicalserver.heat_vision_overlo: Pour everything into your eyes - a roaring beam that scorches and detonates.
power.politicalserver.ground_pound.desc: Slam down with Viltrumite force, cratering the ground and flinging foes away.
power.politicalserver.shock_pulse.desc: Discharge an electric pulse that arcs to your target and jolts everything near.
power.politicalserver.titan_grip.desc: Seize a foe in a crushing grip and slam them down.
power.politicalserver.afterimage.desc: Move so fast you leave afterimages - blinding speed and a flicker of invisibility.
power.politicalserver.regen_surge.desc: Force your cells into overdrive, purging toxins and mending wounds.
power.politicalserver.wind_blast.desc: Clap the air into a concussive blast that hurls everything ahead away.
power.politicalserver.meteor_drop.desc: Call down your full mass on a point, detonating it like an impact crater.
power.politicalserver.seismic_slam.desc: Rupture the earth beneath your foes, throwing them skyward.
power.politicalserver.maximum_meteor.des: Hurl a condensed mass of cursed flame that lands like a falling star.
power.politicalserver.fire_arrow_fuga.de: Launch a lancing arrow of cursed fire that burns through everything in line.
power.politicalserver.coffin_iron_mounta: Sink into a crushing aquatic domain - hardened, untouchable, drowning all who close in.
power.politicalserver.self_embodiment.de: Unfurl your domain of idle transfiguration: every soul within is reshaped and unmade.
power.politicalserver.soul_transfigurati: Touch a foe's soul and twist its shape, crippling body and mind.
power.politicalserver.chimera_shadow_gar: Flood the field with living shadow, loosing a pack of shikigami at your command.
power.politicalserver.nue_strike.desc: Send the thunderbird Nue diving down in a crash of lightning on your mark.
power.politicalserver.gravity_well.desc: Collapse cursed gravity to a single point, dragging in and crushing all nearby.
Manifest the open shrine: relentless cleaving and dismantling rends everything around you.
